title: Beale-Kato-Majda Criterion as EML-3 to EML-inf

analysis.object: T550: Beale-Kato-Majda Criterion as EML-3 to EML-inf depth analysis

bkm_statement.description: BKM: blow-up iff integral of max vorticity diverges; vorticity is EML-3

blow_up_transition.description: Blow-up = EML-3 vorticity trying to become EML-inf; BKM is the threshold criterion
blow_up_transition.reason: BKM criterion is physical EML-4 gap theorem: EML-3 vorticity -> EML-inf is blow-up

eml4_gap.description: EML-4 does not exist; jump from EML-3 to EML-inf is the categorification
eml4_gap.reason: BKM identifies exact moment of categorification: when EML-3 quantity diverges

analysis.theorem: T550: Beale-Kato-Majda Criterion as EML-3 to EML-inf (S829).

key_theorem: T550: Beale-Kato-Majda Criterion as EML-3 to EML-inf (S829).
